news.headline: nVent Electric plc to acquire Avail Infrastructure Solutions' Electrical Products Group for $975 million, adding $375 million in revenue.
news.summary: Shares of nVent Electric plc (NYSE:NVT) are down in premarket trading today following the announcement of its agreement to purchase Avail Infrastructure Solutions' enclosures, switchgear, and bus systems businesses for a total of $975 million. The acquired Electrical Products Group business, operating in North America, has around 1,100 employees and operates out of nine manufacturing sites in the U.S. The business is expected to generate revenues of about $375 million in the 12 months leading up to February 28, 2025, with a solid backlog of orders. nVent Electric plc anticipates that this acquisition will positively impact adjusted earnings per share.

news.headline: ECFC hosts in-person Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C. on March 12-13 to discuss tax-advantaged benefits with Congress.
news.summary: ECFC, a prominent nonprofit advocating for benefit choices, is set to host its Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C., on March 12-13. This pivotal two-day event focuses on amplifying the benefits industry's influence in Capitol Hill. According to Christa Day, ECFC's Executive Director, advocacy plays a crucial role in safeguarding and boosting tax-advantaged benefits. The summit plans to facilitate meetings with House and Senate Congressional staff to further this cause.

news.headline: Aethlon Medical's preclinical data on Hemopurifier in Transplant Immunology Journal suggests broader therapeutic potential beyond virology/oncology. Efforts to evaluate its impact on kidney function.
news.summary: Research findings indicate that the Hemopurifier® may have broader medical applications beyond treating viral infections and cancer, based on preclinical studies. The results suggest that incorporating the Hemopurifier® into a machine perfusion circuit could enhance the function of harvested kidneys. This discovery was made in San Diego on March 10.

news.headline: Hub International buys C&L Marine Insurance in Florida, strengthening marine insurance capabilities. Acquisition of Scott Costolo, Inc. d/b/a C&L Marine Insurance announced on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Chicago, Hub International Limited (Hub), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services company, disclosed the acquisition of Scott Costolo, Inc. operating as C&L Marine Insurance (C&L Marine Insurance). The deal involved the procurement of C&L Marine Insurance's assets, with specific terms of the transaction remaining undisclosed.

news.headline: Rumin8's new product reduces cattle methane emissions by 95.2% in UC Davis trial.
news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania on March 10, 2025, a notable academic institution released the initial scientific results from a Rumin8 animal trial. The study showcased that the investigational veterinary product from Rumin8 successfully decreased overall methane emissions in cattle by an impressive 95.2%. Notably, this reduction in methane levels had no significant effects on other important factors.

news.headline: Hoth Therapeutics to submit Expanded Access App for HT-001 to help cancer patients suffering from EGFR inhibitor treatment effects.
news.summary: Hoth Therapeutics is working on HT-001, a treatment designed to alleviate skin issues caused by EGFR inhibitor therapy in cancer patients. The ongoing clinical trials have shown promising results, and the company aims to make HT-001 accessible to patients facing these adverse effects.

news.headline: Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., USA introduces 17g/capful Polyethylene Glycol 3350 OTC product, similar to MiraLAX®.
news.summary: In Mahwah, New Jersey, on March 10, 2025, Glenmark Therapeutics Inc., based in the USA, revealed the introduction of Polyethylene Glycol 3350, Powder for Solution, in a 17 grams/capful over-the-counter format. This product is being compared to the active ingredient found in MiraLAX® Powder for Solution, which also contains 17 grams and is produced by Bayer.

news.headline: Japanese trade minister to visit US over tariff tensions. Yoji Muto to discuss with officials to avert damages to Japanese firms.
news.summary: Yoji Muto is set to engage in discussions with American authorities prior to the implementation of worldwide tariffs that may harm Japanese corporations, such as major players in the automotive industry.

news.headline: Northstrive Biosciences plans pre-IND meeting with FDA for EL-22, an obesity therapy aiming fat loss and muscle preservation.
news.summary: Northstrive Biosciences, Inc. has set a date for a pre-IND meeting with the FDA regarding EL-22, a promising obesity therapy designed to promote fat loss while preserving muscle mass. EL-22 aims to address the increasing obesity rates worldwide, with recent statistics indicating a rise to approximately 650 million obese individuals globally. The scheduled meeting is a crucial step in the development process, aligning the company with regulatory requirements as it advances towards clinical trials for this innovative treatment approach.

news.headline: Condor Energies Inc. obtains 2nd mining license in Kazakhstan for 6,800-hectare Kolkuduk area, with exploration rights for 6 years.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 10, 2025, Condor Energies Inc. ("Condor" or "the Company") (TSX: CDR), a Canadian energy transition firm, revealed that it has secured its second key minerals mining license, known as the "Kolkuduk License," from the Government Ministry overseeing mining in Kazakhstan. The 6,800-hectare Kolkuduk License grants Condor a 100% working interest and authorization for solid minerals exploration for a period of six years in the Republic of Kazakhstan.

news.headline: Stereotaxis CEO David Fischel will present at 37th Annual Roth Conference in Dana Point, CA. #STXS #ROTHConf
news.summary: Today, on March 10, 2025, St. Louis-based Stereotaxis, a renowned company specializing in surgical robotics for minimally invasive endovascular intervention, shared news about their upcoming participation in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference in Dana Point, California. The event will feature David Fischel, the Chairman and CEO of Stereotaxis. Stereotaxis is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NYSE: STXS.

news.headline: Gold Reserve's Dalinar Energy bids for CITGO, parented by PDV Holding, Inc., aiming to be Stalking Horse Bidder for the sale.
news.summary: Gold Reserve Ltd. revealed that its subsidiary, Dalinar Energy Corporation, submitted a bid on March 7, 2025, to become the Stalking Horse Bidder for acquiring the shares of PDV Holding, Inc., the parent company of CITGO Petroleum Corp. The bid was made as part of the sales process overseen by the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware. Gold Reserve Ltd.'s stocks are listed on TSX.V as GRZ and on OTCQX as GDRZF.

news.headline: Kymeta launches Goshawk u8 terminal for global defense orders amid growing challenges for European allies.
news.summary: A company based in Redmond, Washington, Kymeta, known for its flat-panel satellite antenna technology, has revealed that orders are now open for its Goshawk u8 user terminal. This terminal is tailored for government and global ministry of defense applications. Meeting the increasing demand for adaptable satellite networks and secure open network setups for defense operations, the Goshawk u8 provides a vital solution. In the current climate where allied nations are emphasizing secure, resilient, and swift deployments, the Goshawk u8 addresses these needs effectively.

news.headline: reAlpha received $5 million investment from Mercurius Media Capital LP for advertising inventory exchange.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio, on March 10, 2025, reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), a real estate technology company focusing on artificial intelligence (AI), disclosed a noteworthy development. They have secured a strategic investment totaling $5 million from Mercurius Media Capital LP, a media fund specializing in offering advertising space in return for ownership stakes in ventures. This infusion of funds represents a crucial achievement for reAlpha as it propels forward with its plans to enhance media presence and marketing efforts for broader brand recognition across the nation.

news.headline: Martina Minerals Corp. issues 9,163,000 common shares to 6 creditors in exchange for cancelling $320,705 debt.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Martina Minerals Corp. revealed adjustments to its debt conversion plan. The Corporation revised the debt conversion agreements with six creditors, all independent from the Corporation. Under the amended terms, Martina Minerals Corp. will issue a total of 9,163,000 common shares (referred to as "Debt Shares") to the Creditors. In return, $320,705 in debt will be annulled.

news.headline: Blade Air Mobility and Skyports to launch NYC-JFK flights, pilot program to gather commuter demand info.
news.summary: A new pilot program has been launched to provide crucial information to Skyports and Blade regarding commuter demand, ground operation protocols, and consumer experience in preparation for the deployment of eVTOL aircraft. The program aims to familiarize Skyports and Blade with the demand of commuters and the best practices for ground operations, while also focusing on enhancing the overall consumer experience. This initiative is expected to pave the way for the successful introduction of eVTOL aircraft in the near future.

news.headline: Plus and TIER IV join forces in Japan to advance autonomy with driverless trucks using AI-based software.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Tokyo and Santa Clara, a strategic partnership was unveiled between Plus, a prominent company in AI-based autonomous trucking software, and TIER IV, known for creating the first open-source software for autonomous driving. This collaboration aims to expedite advancements in the autonomous driving industry.

news.headline: Ispire Technology Inc. will attend 37th Annual ROTH Conference, March 16-18, 2025.
news.summary: Ispire Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: ISPR), a leading company in vaping technology and precision dosing, revealed today its involvement in the upcoming 37th Annual ROTH Conference scheduled for March 16-18, 2025. The conference, a prominent event in the industry, will offer a platform for networking and showcasing innovations.

news.headline: UNITY Biotechnology appoints Yehia Hashad, M.D. to its Board of Directors. Dr. Hashad is an ophthalmology expert and executive at Bausch + Lomb.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, UNITY Biotechnology, Inc. disclosed that Yehia Hashad, M.D., the current executive vice president of research and development and chief medical officer at Bausch + Lomb, will be joining their board of directors and science committee. UNITY focuses on creating treatments to impede, stop, or undo age-related illnesses. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker UBX.

news.headline: Beacon and Renovate Robotics partner in roofing automation, with focus on safety and productivity. Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN), a specialty distributor, invests in Renovate Robotics, based in Brooklyn.
news.summary: Beacon, the prominent public specialty wholesale distributor of roofing and related products, headquartered in Herndon, Virginia, revealed a significant step today. The company, listed on Nasdaq as BECN, disclosed a strategic collaboration with Renovate Robotics, based in Brooklyn, New York, a trailblazer in the field of roofing automation. Renovate Robotics is widely recognized for their innovative work in creating autonomous robots specifically designed for roofing tasks, aimed at enhancing safety and efficiency for contractors. The initial robot introduced by Renovate Robotics is named Rufus. This partnership marks a move by Beacon to tap into the potential of robotics technology and revolutionize the roofing industry.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics can deliver transient gene therapy to tumors using systemic platform, killing over 60 tumor cell lines.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) revealed positive preclinical results for its systemic RTNova platform, showcasing successful delivery of transient gene therapy payloads to specific tumors. The company's tumor-specific virotherapy exhibited effectiveness in eradicating more than 60 diverse tumor cell types.

news.headline: CrowdStrike wins Frost & Sullivan's 2024 Company of the Year for SaaS Security; CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield excels in managing SaaS misconfigurations, identities, threats.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 10, 2025, CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield has been acknowledged by Frost & Sullivan as the Company of the Year for 2024. This recognition underscores CrowdStrike's status as a leader in providing top-notch protection and management against SaaS misconfigurations, identities, and threats. CrowdStrike Falcon® Shield stands out for its capability to unify hybrid identity protection, ensuring robust security measures are in place. This distinction highlights the company's dedication to delivering cutting-edge solutions in the cybersecurity realm, solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Renesas launches PROFINET-certified software stacks for RZ/T and RZ/N microprocessors in industrial networking.
news.summary: Renesas recently unveiled a new software stack for its RZ/T and RZ/N series of microprocessors designed for industrial networking. This includes PROFINET-certified IRT and PROFIdrive capabilities. The introduction of this software stack aims to enhance the performance and compatibility of the microprocessors in industrial settings. These new features are expected to bolster the capabilities of the microprocessors, catering to the increasing demand for reliable and efficient industrial networking solutions.

news.headline: NACG reschedules Q4 results & conference call due to Cyclone Alfred impacts; results out on March 19, call on March 20.
news.summary: ACHESON, Alberta, March 10, 2025 - North American Construction Group Ltd. (NACG) has announced a delay in releasing its financial results and conference call for the fourth quarter of 2024 due to Cyclone Alfred impacting the Queensland region. The company now plans to disclose its Q4 2024 financial results on March 19, 2025, after markets close. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for March 20, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET) to discuss the results. NACG trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under NOA.TO and on the New York Stock Exchange under NOA.

news.headline: AARCH Society in Frederick breaks ground on the African American Heritage Center on March 18 at 12:00pm.
news.summary: The African American Resources Cultural and Heritage (AARCH) Society will hold a significant event in Frederick, Maryland on Tuesday, March 18th at 12:00pm. Scheduled for March 10, 2025, this long-awaited vision is finally coming to fruition as the society proudly declares the groundbreaking of the African American Heritage initiative.

news.headline: Semtech launches LR2021 transceiver with LoRa Gen 4 tech. Supports sub-GHz, 2.4 GHz ISM bands. Backward compatible.
news.summary: Semtech Corporation has launched the LR2021, the inaugural chip in the LoRa Plus series. This new chip features a fourth-generation LoRa IP and can operate on terrestrial and SATCOM networks within the sub-GHz, 2.4 GHz ISM bands, and licensed S-band frequencies. The transceiver is engineered to maintain compatibility with earlier LoRa devices. Semtech Corporation, traded on Nasdaq as SMTC, is a prominent provider of high-performance semiconductors, IoT systems, and cloud connectivity services.

news.headline: Rita's Italian Ice celebrates First Day of Spring with Free Italian Ice giveaway and new SKITTLES® flavor. 30 app users can win Free Italian Ice for a Year!
news.summary: An acclaimed frozen treat company is giving 30 Rita's Ice app users the opportunity to win Free Italian Ice for a Year! The promotion is part of Rita's Italian Ice & Frozen Custard's long-standing annual custom. This beloved brand is based in Philadelphia and the announcement was made on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: Glass House Brands will attend the 37th Annual ROTH Conference on March 16-18, 2025, in Dana Point, California.
news.summary: Glass House Brands Inc., a prominent cannabis company in the U.S., revealed its attendance at the 37th Annual ROTH Conference scheduled for March 16-18, 2025, in Dana Point, California. Recognized for its rapid growth, Glass House is listed as (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) and (CBOE CA: GLAS.WT.U) on the Canadian stock market, as well as (OTCQX: GLASF) and (OTCQX: GHBWF) on the U.S. market.

news.headline: JBL unveils new Flip 7 and Charge 6 speakers for bigger sound and deeper bass, revolutionizing on-the-go listening.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, JBL, a worldwide authority in portable audio, introduces the latest advancements in mobile listening with the release of two new products: the JBL Flip 7 and Charge 6.

news.headline: Strategic Venue Partners raises $120 million through inaugural 4(a)2 private placement to support growth in U.S. wireless infrastructure.
news.summary: Strategic Venue Partners (SVP), a prominent provider of in-building wireless infrastructure in the U.S., based in Greenwich, Conn., disclosed on March 10, 2025, the successful conclusion of its first-ever 4(a)2 private placement. This initiative aimed at collecting funds resulted in an impressive $120 million of debt known as the "Notes."

news.headline: 4DMT initiates Phase 3 trial for 4D-150 in Wet AMD with first patients enrolled at multiple sites.
news.summary: In Emeryville, California, on March 10, 2025, 4D Molecular Therapeutics (Nasdaq: FDMT or 4DMT) reported initiating patient enrollment for the 4FRONT-1 Phase 3 trial for 4D-150, a therapy for wet age-related macular degeneration. This late-stage biotech company aims to revolutionize treatment approaches, potentially providing significant advantages to patients. The trial targets wet AMD, with patients being enrolled at multiple locations.

news.headline: Ubiqconn Technology joins Satellite 2025 in Washington DC to showcase communication solutions from March 11-13.
news.summary: Ubiqconn Technology, a prominent provider of industrial Internet of Vehicle (IoV) and embedded Internet of Things (IoT) solutions, has revealed its participation at Satellite 2025 in Washington DC on March 11-13, 2025. This event marks an occasion where the company will showcase its innovative offerings in the realm of technology.

news.headline: FIS introduces AI tool, Treasury GPT, for Treasury Industry with Microsoft Azure, yielding quick responses on product queries.
news.summary: FIS, a prominent name in financial technology, released a new product support tool named FIS Treasury and Risk Manager - Treasury GPT. This tool, integrated into FIS Treasury and Risk Manager – Integrity Edition, utilizes generative AI and is in partnership with Microsoft. By leveraging Microsoft Azure OpenAI Service, it improves data management and risk analysis. It efficiently provides responses to inquiries about the product, enhancing usability. This collaboration aims to boost efficiency and user experience in financial services.

news.headline: Kratos OpenEdge 2500 digitizer first in satellite ground system to achieve DIFI standard compliance, improving interoperability.
news.summary: The Kratos OpenEdge 2500 digitizer has achieved a significant accomplishment in enhancing interoperability of satellite network equipment. This advancement marks a crucial milestone for the product, which is designed to improve communication efficiency. With a focus on interoperability, the OpenEdge 2500 digitizer is set to revolutionize satellite networks by ensuring seamless integration of equipment. This milestone highlights the success and potential of the digitizer in the industry.

news.headline: Upcoming "Reef Builders" docu at SXSW Film Fest will showcase coral restoration; extends global reach. Presented by SHEBA®, features coral heroes.
news.summary: Today, on March 10, 2025, a film presented by the SHEBA® brand in collaboration with actor and advocate Auli'i Cravalho and AMV Stream was revealed in London. The film showcases the incredible narratives of "reef builders" dedicated to preserving coral reefs globally. This collaboration aims to raise awareness about the urgent need to protect these vital ecosystems.

news.headline: Zetaris appoints Robert Herjavec as Executive Director for global strategy, aiming to expand in the U.S. and global markets.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Zetaris, a leading modern lakehouse for AI, has revealed that Robert Herjavec from Shark Tank has assumed the role of Executive Director of Global Strategy. This announcement comes as the company ramps up its growth efforts in the U.S. and worldwide. Herjavec, renowned for his role on ABC's Shark Tank, is a prominent serial entrepreneur with a strong presence in the cybersecurity sector. Having founded and sold numerous companies in this field, such as the Herjavec Group, he brings valuable expertise to Zetaris as it expands further into global markets.

news.headline: Pelican Energy Partners acquires United Services Group, a leading welding, machining, and fabrication contractor in North Carolina.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Pelican Energy Partners revealed the purchase of United Services Group (USG), a prominent company based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Known for its comprehensive welding, machining, and fabrication services, USG has now been acquired by Pelican.

news.headline: ContextLogic(Nasdaq: LOGC) to announce Q4&full year 2024 results on March 12, 2025. CEO&Rishi Bajaj, Chairman Ted Goldthorpe to host call&webcast.
news.summary: Oakland-based ContextLogic Inc. (Nasdaq: LOGC) has scheduled the release of its Q4 and full year 2024 financial results for March 12, 2025, after the market closes. The company's CEO, Rishi Bajaj, and Chairman, Ted Goldthorpe, will conduct a live conference call and webcast at 5:00 PM ET / 2:00 PM PT on the same day. They will discuss the Q4 results and elaborate on the strategic investment and commitment by BC Partners in ContextLogic Holdings, LLC. This move aims to provide insight to shareholders, analysts, and portfolio managers.

news.headline: Forcepoint acquiring Getvisibility, leader in AI-based Data Security Posture Management. Enhances risk visibility.
news.summary: A technology company based in Austin, Texas, known for its expertise in data security, Forcepoint, recently revealed that it has officially agreed to purchase Getvisibility. This company specializes in AI-driven solutions for Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) and Data Detection and Response (DDR). By adding Getvisibility's capabilities to Forcepoint’s Data Security Everywhere platform, users will now have improved tools for recognizing and addressing data-related risks. This acquisition strengthens the collaboration between the two companies, aiming to streamline security processes.

news.headline: Playa Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ: PLYA) celebrates opening Wyndham Alltra Punta Cana in Dominican Republic.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 10, 2025, Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V. revealed the grand opening of Wyndham Alltra Punta Cana in the Dominican Republic. Playa, a top owner and operator of all-inclusive resorts in Mexico and the Caribbean, made this announcement proudly. The new resort, part of the Wyndham brand, marks a significant addition to Playa's portfolio and is located in a popular tourist destination in the Caribbean. This opening signals Playa's commitment to expanding its presence in the region and providing memorable vacation experiences for guests.

news.headline: Humacyte reveals the Budget Impact Model for Symvess in Journal of Medical Economics; bioengineered tissue can serve as universal vascular conduit.
news.summary: Symvess is an innovative bioengineered human tissue that serves as a universally implantable vascular conduit for arterial replacement and repair. This groundbreaking technology marks a significant advancement in the medical field with the potential to revolutionize vascular procedures. With its unique design and properties, Symvess offers a promising solution for patients in need of vascular interventions. Its impact is underscored by its status as the first of its kind in the medical community. The widespread applicability of Symvess as a vascular conduit is expected to bring about positive outcomes for patients and healthcare providers alike, significantly shaping the future of arterial surgeries.

news.headline: Stellar Cyber in SAN JOSE, California earns ISO 27001 certification for its AI-driven XDR platform, ensuring data security.
news.summary: A cybersecurity company based in San Jose, California, Stellar Cyber, has recently obtained ISO 27001 certification for its AI-powered Open XDR security operations platform. This certification, granted by an independent assessment entity, confirms that Stellar Cyber's security measures meet globally accepted standards for safeguarding the confidentiality and integrity of data belonging to employees, customers, and partners. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to upholding top-tier security practices in protecting sensitive information.

news.headline: A-Mark buys Stack's Bowers, AMS Holding, LLC, and Pinehurst Coin Exchange, expanding into the collectible coin market.
news.summary: A-Mark Precious Metals, Inc., based in El Segundo, California, made an announcement on March 10, 2025, regarding its latest activities in the collectible coin market. The company, listed on NASDAQ as AMRK, revealed its ongoing efforts in expanding its operations in this sector. A-Mark, recognized as a prominent fully integrated platform for precious metals, disclosed the acquisition of a certain number of valuable collectible coins as part of its strategic move.

news.headline: Esri partners with Google Maps for Photorealistic 3D Tiles, enhancing ArcGIS with immersive maps. Exciting integration!
news.summary: At the 2025 Partner Conference in Redlands, California, Esri, a leading provider of location intelligence, revealed their partnership with Google Maps Platform. This collaboration will allow users to generate intricate and visually engaging 3D maps and scenes by incorporating Google’s Photorealistic 3D Tiles into the ArcGIS suite. Richard Cooke, the Corporate Director of Global Business at Esri, expressed enthusiasm about the partnership stating, "We are thrilled to work with Google Maps Platform to make this valuable data accessible to our user base." This integration will provide users with enhanced mapping capabilities, offering a more immersive and detailed spatial experience. No specific numbers were provided in the news piece.

news.headline: Meritus Gas Partners partners with Oxygen Service Company, a top distributor of gases, from Saint Paul, Minnesota.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Meritus Gas Partners revealed a new partnership with Oxygen Service Company (OSC), a prominent distributor of packaged gases and welding supplies based in Saint Paul, Minnesota. This union signifies a significant move in the industry with Meritus Gas Partners and OSC combining forces to enhance their market presence and offerings. This collaboration is expected to bring together the expertise and resources of both companies, capitalizing on Meritus Gas Partners’ proven track record in the sector and OSC’s leading position as an independent distributor. The partnership aims to leverage OSC’s widespread network and Meritus Gas Partners’ financial capabilities to drive growth and expansion. This strategic alliance is anticipated to result in a boost in revenue for both businesses, potentially reaching substantial figures in the near future.

news.headline: Strategy launches $21 billion STRK At-The-Market program for perpetual strike preferred stock.
news.summary: Tysons Corner, Virginia—Strategy™ revealed a sales agreement allowing them to offer up to $21.0 billion worth of its 8.00% series A perpetual strike preferred stock, each share valued at $0.001. The agreement, referred to as the "ATM Program," enables Strategy to issue and sell shares of the perpetual strike preferred stock. Holders of the perpetual strike preferred stock have the option to convert them into shares of Strategy's class A common stock.

news.headline: Aligos Therapeutics reports key financial results (2024): Net loss of $131.2M, R&D expenses $70.3M, cash $56.9M (Dec 31). Exciting developments in potential treatments for liver and viral diseases.
news.summary: Aligos Therapeutics, Inc. reported recent business progress and financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company completed a $105 million private financing and promoted Lesley Ann Calhoun to Executive VP & CFO. ALG-000184, a potential CAM-E for chronic hepatitis B virus infection, had positive data with sustained HBV DNA suppression. ALG-055009, a potential THR-β agonist for MASH, showed promise in reducing liver fat. The company also launched clinical trials for ALG-097558, a pan-coronavirus protease inhibitor. Financially, the company had $56.9 million in cash by Dec 31, 2024, and reported a net loss of $82.2 million for Q4 2024. R&D expenses decreased, and G&A expenses were lower compared to 2023. The company's cash is expected to fund operations into the second half of 2026. Aligos focuses on developing therapies for liver and viral diseases and aims to continue advancing its purpose-built pipeline. Total cash, cash equivalents, and investments by Dec 31, 2024: $56.9 millionPrivate placement financing completed on Feb 13, 2025: $105 millionNet loss for Q4 2024: $82.2 millionNet loss for the year ended Dec 31, 2024: $131.2 millionR&D expenses for Q4 2024: $16.0 millionG&A expenses for Q4 2024: $5.2 million

news.headline: BetterLife Pharma Inc. converts debt to issue 642,329 common shares & warrants worth $64,232.88. Warrants exercisable at $0.10/share, expiring in late 2026.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 10, 2025, BetterLife Pharma Inc. (CSE: BETR / OTCQB: BETRF / FRA: NPAU), a biotech company developing BETR-001, a non-hallucinogenic derivative of LSD, has issued 642,329 common shares and 642,329 share purchase warrants. This issuance is in relation to the conversion of convertible debentures and accrued interest amounting to $64,232.88. The share purchase warrants can be converted into common shares at a ratio of one-for-one, with an exercise price of $0.10 per warrant. These warrants are valid until September 27, 2026, and October 29, 2026, respectively.

news.headline: OSG releases self-service and AI innovations at Elevate 2025 webinar, showcasing future vision.
news.summary: In Carol Stream, Illinois, on March 10, 2025, OSG held the OSG Elevate 2025 product release event on March 5. The event showcased new self-service customer communication solutions and introduced an AI-driven vision for the future. The event, a part of OSG's Elevate series, featured innovative offerings for customers.

news.headline: Hathaway Dinwiddie promotes Kevin O'Riordan as President and CEO, Sara Carmody as EVP; Greg Cosko becomes Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Company based in San Francisco unveiled its new leadership team. Kevin O'Riordan has been appointed as the President and CEO while Sara Carmody will take on the role of Executive Vice President. These promotions come as outgoing CEO Greg Cosko transitions to the position of Executive Chairman. This change in leadership positions aims to harness the expertise and vision of the executives to drive the company's growth and success.
